description: Product Description SYVOFOX is a manufacturer of baby bibs. We are focusing on making high quality, functional and cute products since 2002. Our products reach millions of moms and newborns around the world as we sell the products to over 20 countires annually. 3 Layers of Fabirc Design Constructed with waterproof inner layer materials, this dribble bibs ensures that drool and spills are quickly captured, preventing wetness and discomfort. High Neck Coverage The mock neck design provides extended coverage, protecting your baby's neck and clothes from food and liquid messes.
